sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find when level 2 started
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    if t.after_frame.level == 2 and (i == 0 or transitions[i-1].after_frame.level != 2):
        print(f"Level 2 started at transition {i}")
        seg = t.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        print("State at level 2 start:")
        for n in seg:
            if n['color'] in ['Y', 'S', 'O', 'N', 'r']:
                b = n['boundary']
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                if min(rows) < 50:
                    print(f"  Color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
